---
title: "De l'utilisation de Talend pour l'OpenData de l'Assemblée Nationale"
subtitle: "Formation DATA"
author:
    name: GOLLENTZ Quentin
#    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/quentin-gollentz-697993172/
    email: quentin.gollentz@outlook.com
date: last-modified
date-format: "DD-MM-YYYY"
description: "Application sur l'Open Data de l'Assemblée Nationale"
title-block-banner: "#ECF4FA"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    theme: cosmo
    fontcolor: black
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: Summary
    toc-depth: 3
    html-math-method: katex
engine: knitr
css: css/styles.css
resources:
  - pdf/**
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72

---

```{=html}

<div class="pdf-container">
    <object 
      data="pdf/talend_opendata.pdf"
      type="application/pdf"
      width="100%"
      height="1000px"
      style="margin-top: 1rem;"
    >
    </object>
</div>



<p style="text-align:center; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-top: 1rem;">
    📄 <a href="pdf/talend_opendata.pdf" download>
        Télécharger le PDF (clic ici)
    </a>
</p>

```
